title: Tezit Inline Tez Schema (Level 0)
description: JSON Schema for validating the YAML frontmatter of an Inline Tez (Level 0). An Inline Tez is a single Markdown file with YAML frontmatter containing synthesis, context references, and metadata. This schema describes the structure of the parsed YAML frontmatter object. Citations in the Markdown body reference context items by their 'label' field rather than by item-id.

title.description: Human-readable title of the Inline Tez.

profile.description: Tez profile indicating the intended consumption pattern.

creator.description: Information about the creator of this Inline Tez.

context.description: List of context items. Each item must have a label and either a url, file path, or embedded content.

id.description: OPTIONAL stable identifier for citation continuity across export and import.

url.description: URL to an external context source.

file.description: Relative path to a local file.

label.description: Human-readable label for this context item. Used in double-bracket citations within the Markdown body, e.g. [[Q4 Budget Spreadsheet]].

mime.description: OPTIONAL media type of decoded embedded content. Defaults to text/plain when omitted.

size.description: OPTIONAL decoded byte length of content_b64.

hash.description: OPTIONAL but RECOMMENDED when content_b64 is present. Importers MUST re-hash decoded content and MUST flag and log mismatches; mismatched content is never silently propagated as verified and is not silently dropped.

content_b64.description: OPTIONAL embedded context content using the standard base64 alphabet. content_b64 MAY appear with or without url or file. It MUST use only A-Z, a-z, 0-9, +, /, and = so embedded content cannot produce a YAML frontmatter delimiter line.

interrogate.description: Whether recipients can interrogate this Tez.

fork.description: Whether recipients can create derivative tezits.

tags.description: Classification tags for the Inline Tez.
